column2: Table 4.0: Visa cancellations by visa category, 2023–24 to 2024–25
Note: Last visa held relates to last substantive visa held, Bridging visas were excluded.
Figures were extracted from Departmental systems on 3 July 2025. As data is drawn from a live system environment, the figures provided may differ from statistics previously published.
Includes s501 visa cancellations. Categories are based on 2024–25.
